notes: Complete for the recursive clauses: structure <D,I> (def:structure), assignment s (def:var-assign), formula phi (def:wff-pred), atomic clause via term values (def:term-interp) and the interpretation I inside def:structure, and the quantifier clauses via the modified assignment s[x -> d] over D (def:mod-assign).
